description: InfoHunter data source self-healing genes. Extracted from .context/KNOWN_ISSUES.md and operational patterns.

strategy: Detect YouTube OAuth token failure from error logs or health check
Attempt automatic token refresh via refresh_token
If refresh fails, disable YouTube subscriptions temporarily
Report to ops-dashboard with action_hint for manual re-authorization
genes.summary: Auto-refresh YouTube OAuth token or gracefully disable source on persistent failure

strategy: Detect SSL/TLS failure pattern from fetch errors
Retry with SSL verification disabled (for known-safe internal feeds)
Add problematic feed URL to SSL-skip allowlist
Log the incident for manual review
genes.summary: Retry RSS feeds with relaxed SSL when encountering TLS handshake failures

strategy: Detect rate limiting from API response codes
Apply exponential backoff to the affected source
genes.summary: Apply exponential backoff and reduce batch size when hitting API rate limits

strategy: Detect AI analysis failures exceeding retry threshold
Reset analysis retry counters for affected items
Reduce analysis batch_size to lower memory pressure
If persistent, skip complex items and process simpler ones first
genes.summary: Recover from AI analysis pipeline failures by resetting counters and reducing batch pressure
